summary: Web application with prominent speaker logo, branded slogan, and audio upload system featuring favorites and audio replies for logged-in members
architectural_notes: Audio uploads exist in general feed and category-specific views
Audio reply system creates independent uploads with linkage to original audio
Favorite and reply features require user authentication
imageRequirements:
## Edit Images
- Crop the bottom edge to remove excess white space underneath the speaker graphic (speakr-logo.png > speakr-logo-cropped.dim_800x400.png)

existing_features.title: Move the BrandingBannerDropdown component (containing About and Privacy Policy links) to be positioned next to the logo in the top left area of the header
Reposition the login button (currently on the right side) to be directly underneath the dropdown menu in the top left area
Add small spacing between the dropdown menu and login button to ensure easy touch/click targets
Reduce the vertical padding and spacing around all header elements in the Header component to create a more compact top section
Decrease the vertical spacing between the logo, BrandingBannerDropdown menu, and login button that are stacked in the top left area
Move the slogan text closer to the header content to reduce the overall header height and create a more compact top section
Add a favorite button with heart icon to each audio upload card in the feed and dashboard, visible and functional only for logged-in members
Add an audio reply button to each audio upload card that opens the audio recording interface for logged-in members to record a response
Add an 'Audio Replies' section below each audio card that displays all linked audio replies as a list of playable audio cards
Update the AudioCard component to include favorite and reply buttons with proper authentication checks and integrate with backend services

Fix the error that occurs when clicking the reply button to post an audio reply after recording has completed successfully. Ensure the reply is properly submitted to the backend with the correct replyTo reference linking it to the original post.
Add proper error handling and user feedback in the AudioReplyDialog component to display specific error messages when reply submission fails, including backend validation errors and network issues.
Remove the stationary upload button that is positioned to the right of the logo in the header (underneath the floating buttons)
Reduce the vertical spacing between the logo and slogan to make them appear more compact and closely grouped together
Increase the vertical spacing below the slogan to create clear separation between the slogan and the search bar underneath it
Further reduce the overall vertical padding around all header elements in the Header component to create an even more compact header section
Further decrease the vertical spacing between the logo and slogan beyond the current implementation to group them even more closely together
Ensure adequate vertical spacing remains between the slogan and the search bar below it to maintain clear visual separation

new_feature_requests.summary: Enlarge speaker logo to fill available white space at top of page
Update slogan to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with capital G and exclamation mark
Increase the size of the speaker logo/placeholder at the top of the page to fill the available white space, making it significantly larger than its current size
Update the slogan text to 'Giving Everyone A Voice!' with a capital 'G' at the beginning and an exclamation mark at the end
Move dropdown menu (About/Privacy Policy) next to logo in top left, place login button underneath with small spacing
Make header more compact by reducing spacing/padding and moving slogan closer
Add favorite button (heart icon) to each audio upload, accessible only to logged-in members
Add audio reply button to record responses directly to any audio upload, accessible only to logged-in members
Store audio replies as independent uploads linked to the original audio file
Create separate 'Audio Replies' section to display linked responses for each audio upload
Store audio replies as independent audio posts in the backend with a reference link to the original audio post they are replying to
Remove the stationary upload button positioned to the right of the logo (underneath the floating buttons)
Reduce spacing between the logo and slogan to make them more compact
Increase spacing below the slogan to separate it from the search bar
Further reduce overall header spacing and padding to make it even more compact
Move slogan even closer underneath the logo while maintaining separation from search bar
Crop the logo image to remove excess white space underneath, allowing the slogan to sit much closer to the logo
Crop the speaker logo image file to remove excess white space underneath the graphic, allowing the slogan to sit much closer to the logo and creating a more compact header overall

projectName: Enlarge logo and update slogan formatting
